tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I've got this assignment wrapped up in minutes with no other deadlines looming, so I'll just finish it and then head straight to catch up with the cohort.
The deadline just passed while I was still at 95%, which means I missed it entirely. I need to talk to the prof immediately before I head out with the group.
I'm 99% done but the deadline passed while I waited; I need to confront the prof now before meeting my friends.

desires: Get this submission out to the prof before I leave so I don't look like I'm flaking on my word
Tell the cohort about the deadline miss immediately so they don't think I'm late because I ignored them
Finish this last 1% of work right now so I can stop feeling that nagging guilt and get back to hanging out

goals.description: Hit submit on the assignment RIGHT NOW (it's at 99%) just to stop the panic, then immediately jump into lunch with cohort_3 before they vanish.
goals.rationale: I'm at 99% and that nagging guilt is ruining my vibe. If I don't submit this second, I'll look like I ghosted them. The deadline passed, but finishing now lets me claim 'done' so I can prioritize the only thing that matters right now: hanging out with my friends. Future consequences? Screw those; I need relief *now*.

goals.description: Send a quick, slightly defensive text to prof_assignment explaining the glitch/panic, then delete the draft from my notes folder.
goals.rationale: I have to manage the narrative about why I missed the mark, but only after the immediate social obligation (lunch) is secured. If I spend too much time crafting an apology now, I'll miss the group chat start. I'll handle it when the adrenaline drops.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm at 99%; finishing this now stops the panic so I can eat with cohort_3 before they vanish. Future grades don't matter if I miss lunch, but submitting secures my 'done' status for today.
